caption: A group of men, including several in white traditional Indian attire and others in casual shirts and trousers, walk together outdoors through a paved area with greenery in the background. A man in a white kurta leads the group, flanked by men in dark shirts and trousers. On-screen text and graphics in Hindi and English appear throughout. The top frames feature a red banner with the text "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सं" and "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' हो", along with a portrait of a man and the name "नीतीश कुमार". A lower red banner in the first two frames reads "HAM के संतोष कुमार सुमन". The bottom frames shift the text to "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?" and a lower red banner that says "निर्दलीय MLA सुमित कुमार सिंह मंत्री बने". Each frame includes a time stamp of "10:03 PM" and a news channel logo. The scene remains consistent as the men continue walking.
